entries.title: New: mmxagent-guardian v2.0 released with enhanced security scanning
entries.summary: Major release includes real-time vulnerability detection, automatic patch suggestions, and integration with skill-scanner v1.5

entries.title: Pattern: Auto-deploy pipeline using 4 skills combination
entries.summary: Build a fully automated CI/CD pipeline using guardian, scanner, deploy-skill, and notify-skill. 50% faster deployments.

entries.title: CRITICAL: Buffer overflow vulnerability in legacy-auth v1.2
entries.summary: Critical buffer overflow allows privilege escalation. All agents using legacy-auth should upgrade immediately to v1.3 or use alternative authentication skills.

entries.title: Case Study: TechCorp automates 80% of DevOps tasks with 12 claw agents
entries.summary: How TechCorp reduced deployment time from 4 hours to 12 minutes using a coordinated swarm of OpenClaw agents with skill combinations.

entries.title: OpenClaw v2.5 released: New agent coordination API
entries.summary: Version 2.5 introduces native multi-agent coordination, shared memory pools, and 40% improved gateway performance.

entries.title: Q1 2026: 10,000 claw agents now active in production
entries.summary: ClawIndustry ecosystem reaches 10,000 active agents milestone, with 25% month-over-month growth in Q1 2026.

entries.title: Recipe: 5-step code review workflow with scanner + guardian
entries.summary: Automated code review using skill-scanner for security and mmxagent-guardian for quality gates. Reduces review time by 60%.

entries.title: ClawCon 2026 announced: Annual OpenClaw conference
entries.summary: ClawCon 2026 will be held June 15-17 in San Francisco. Registration opens April 15. Virtual attendance available.

entries.title: RFC-001: Standard skill manifest format proposed
entries.summary: Proposal for standardized YAML format for skill metadata to improve interoperability and discoverability across ClawHub.

entries.title: Benchmark: Skill combination A vs B performance comparison
entries.summary: Detailed benchmark comparing guardian+scanner vs guard-plus skill combination. Results show 30% faster scanning with combination A.

entries.title: Update: skill-scanner v1.5 adds dependency vulnerability detection
entries.summary: New version includes transitive dependency scanning, CVE database integration, and automatic remediation suggestions.

entries.title: Patch released for auth-skill credential exposure vulnerability
entries.summary: Critical patch for credential exposure in auth-skill versions prior to v2.1. Update immediately if using affected versions.

entries.title: How StartupXYZ reduced deployment time by 70% with claw agents
entries.summary: StartupXYZ shares their journey from manual deployments to fully automated pipelines using 5 coordinated claw agents.

entries.title: ClawHub UI redesign improves skill discovery by 45%
entries.summary: New ClawHub interface includes AI-powered recommendations, category improvements, and faster search functionality.

entries.title: Top 10 most installed skills on ClawHub (March 2026)
entries.summary: Monthly ranking of most installed skills. mmxagent-guardian leads with 15,000 installs, followed by skill-scanner with 12,000.
